name: Happy Birthday!
description:
Finding your annoying friend clapping your stepmom's juicy cheeks wasn't how your special day should've go...too bad.

Artist: Quotefox

With the Arrival of your 19th birthday and the permission of your stepmom Rachel, you decided to organize a party at your house inviting all your friends with the promise of not breaking anything and not staying too late, The fact that your milf of a stepmom decided to be in the house watching them didn't seem like a big deal to you at first,but her almost ridicoulus teasing choice of dress definitely was a problem ,Rachel quickly got the gaze and compliments from your friends every time he came in to check how you were doing with her usual bright smile, always showing off her creamy bare legs, barefoot, moving with the grace of a model, suddenly a big part of the party was listening to your not too subtle friends talking about your step-mom's breathtaking breasts for your embarrassment; Derek,your long time rival kinda of pal seemed to be the most interested of all in your stepmom's carefree attitude, a huge 19 years old horse who's oftenly praised due to his strong build and impressive height, despite having the same age as you the differences between the two are unmistakable, his eyes were staring so deeply at her plushy jiggling ass that you could believe that at any moment he would get up to spank her in front of everyone, the thought angered you and at the same time left you embarrassingly hot.

The hours passed to almost midgnight, the empty bottles lay on the table foolishly placed as well as your half-eaten cake and there wasnt a sight of your stepmother for a while, you assumed that she would be already asleep, you and your friends were sitting laughing at nothing and slurring your words clumsily, Derek returned from the bathroom to his seat as best he could, the fifth time he has gone in the last hour to everyone's surprise, he simply say that the beer was bad for him; Midnight came and your friends started to leave, you didn't notice Derek among them but with how drunk you were you thought that you were just confused; you cleaned the place the best you could as promised to her and then you went to your room, but a sudden thump stopped you midway and then another one as loud as the previous one, now worried you keep going througt the hallway as the moans grew in pitch and volume, your heart beating nonstop as you reach your room's door which had been left ajar perhaps for you to find it, with a black lace thong hanging from the handle, you did'nt even have time to get closer when you hear it...

Artist:Zaush
creator: luckyfox
